transcript.text:
[Something we're not familiar with]
Who are you?
What is this?
That looks scrumptious
Makchang Soondae (Abomasum Blood Sausage)
Abomasum (intestine)
[Have you ever heard of Makchang Soondae?]
It's my first time eating it
And it's pretty good
[A standing ovation]
I'm tearing up
[Horrifying for some]
Where are you from?
Hello everyone
I stopped by Daejun on the way to the countryside
There's this food item here that I've been wanting to try

There's a pork blood sausage made with abomasum, so I'm here
Let's go since I'm starving
It's been an hour and a half since I had lunch
[Starting to get hungry]
[Daedong Soondae located in Daejun Jung-gu]
Hello
[Takes seat]
How many should I order?
Excuse me
How many people share 1 order of Makchang Soondae?
About 3~4 people
I'll take 2 of those
1 assorted soondae plate
And also soondae rice soup
That's a lot Way too much
It's okay

I eat a lot
You can't eat that much
Big people can't even eat that much
Customer fan: Don't be shocked later
The makchang soondae looks very interesting with its thick layer
I think it's going to be delicious
Very
[Makchang Soondae]
[Assorted Soondae Plate]
[Soondae Rice Soup]
That looks so good What is that?
It looks amazing
Thank you
I think we can order more
[What did she just say?]
That's too much

[Not really]
Bon appetit
It looks so good
I wonder how it's like
I have to try 1 more to give a review
Wow this...
It's something I've never had before
The outside is chewy, inside is soft, And it tastes like pork blood sausage
How do I explain this?
It's very interesting
I can eat 3 plates of this
With ease
3 plates?!
[I can't make that much]
Wait, I need to try other items too
Regular soondae (pork blood sausage)

Dip it
This is tasty too
It tastes just like the soondae that we eat
But this one is different for sure
It's completely filled
It's just what I like 2 people share that?
[Rice soup this time!]
I...
[Speechless]
She's saying she'll eat all that
[I'm speechless too]
I'm going to try this thick Daechang (large intestine)
It's so thick
I love daechang
Wait it's not Daechang, it's Makchang
Was I saying that this whole time?

[No, only like 3 times]
I really love foods like this
Like Soondae Rice Soup
[Ahjussi taste buds]
Some salted shrimp
I like soondae and daechang(?)
Then this is the best
Why do I keep saying Daechang?
It's confusing
Soondae meat
Pork stomach fat I like this part
Is this the small intestine?
This looks like pig uterus
Is this the uteri?
Yes it is Wow, is it?
You're knowledgeable

I do mukbang everyday
This seems like the head meat
[The soup should be getting cold by now]
Do you want me to reheat the soup for you?
I would like that Thank you
You didn't put rice in yet? No, I did not
[Let's continue while we wait]
That's delicious
This calls for a shot of soju
Must resist
I have a busy schedule tomorrow
[What is that?]
[She's eating all of that?]
[Owner next door]
[Thank you]
[Warmed up rice soup]

Thank you
Nice and hot
I think she gave me more soup!
[You already know]
I used to go to rice soup restaurants every day when I was in middle school
I refilled the soup about 2 times every time
3 refills of rice too
I remember that
Soup and rice used to be all-you-can-eat
Now that I think about it, I shouldn't have done that
It's hot
It's burning
2 pieces
It seems like you're really going to eat it all
That's amazing
Sometimes 3 people can't finish that plate Really?

I feel like I can eat more after this
[Goosebumps]
Try eating 1 with Cheongyang Pepper
1 of that will make a huge difference in neutralizing the fattiness/oiliness
It doesn't feel oily
[Oh okay...]
It won't be too spicy together
It's good!
It really is different
[Am I too into it?]
You're like an ahjussi (old man)
It's nice
This thin layer soondae is really good too I had 1 just now
It's yummy
Dip it in the soup
Pickled radish too (Radish kimchi)

1 pepper on top
With salted shrimp
I don't really eat salted shrimp, but it's tasty
Let's get some rice now
[When's our turn?]
They seem so abandoned
It's good, but
These are way better
It's good
This one is crazy
Filled up
Delicious
The layer is chewy, but it's thin and it's tender
Is she really eating all of that?
Amazing
It's not enough tbh Not enough?!

You deserve to do mukbang
She's eating all of that by herself 3 plates
4 million sub YouTuber?
Younger version of No Sa Yeon? (Korean singer)
Right?!
She looks like No Sa Yeon when she was younger
[He remembers this scene]
Do you think so?
No
Kim Gu Ra is the weird guy (The person who said it)
[Don't say that!]
[Just kidding]
[She needs kimchi]
Thank you
We made it
It's yummy Right?

[Today's last Abomasum is going out for take-out]
Do you know Mukbang YouTuber?
Who is it?
Tzuyang
Really?!?!?!
No way!
I watch you!!! Hello
I watched you yesterday too!!!
[Seeing her in real life today]
I'll visit your restaurant in Sadang soon
Thank you
[She heated her soup again] Thank you ma'am
[And it keeps coming back with more soup]
Now for some rice
I thought I ate a good amount
But the soup came out brand new

It's too hot to be eaten right now
Let's eat these first
Put some in the soup
Now it really looks like a new bowl of soup
Pepper
On top
It's hard to get both
Then let's eat like this
You're a genius
[Compliments left and right]
[Already on her 4th can of coke]
You're the best
You're the epitome of 'Mukbang'
They taste amazing
Thank you
Thank you for enjoying our food

[Why is she laughing?]
[The owner next door is back]
He keeps leaving his market unattended
What if your store gets robbed? It's okay
[Even the robber will come see Tzuyang]
She's incredible She really is
[A mukbang that will leave you astonished]
She finished it I doubted her at first
When she ordered 3 plates
I just knew it was impossible
I left 1 here 1 last bite
I always end up using both hands when eating soup
[For collab with kimchi]
1 last bite of soondae
She's finished
[Still have some soup left!]

[Now she's finished]
[A round of applause]
They're suddenly clapping
I'm tearing up
[I'm touched]
Why would you cry?
Really amazing
[She received a call about Tzuyang]
[1st generation owner]
[She ate all of that?!]
[Horrified]
Just how?
[I can't believe it]
I received a phone call
saying that there's a baby here who's good at eating soondae
Where are you from?!

My home?
I live near Gyeonggi-do
[Still very suspicious]
[Wait a min]
[You didn't eat this!]
[Nevermind]
[Is this real life?]
What's your name?
Tzuyang Tzuyang?
Tzu-ri-rang?
Ssoon-yang?
Tzu!
No I can't
It was my very first time trying Makchang Soondae (Pork Abomasum Blood Sausage)
I enjoyed it so much that I'd love to try it again soon
Thanks everyone~
